title: Science Y-Goals Progression Map Schema
description: Schema for science_y_goals_map.json — the backbone progression reference covering all year levels from Foundation to 10. Used for prior knowledge lookups across the chain. Each entry contains the ACARA descriptor and the interpreted Y-goal for the tool.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this file contains.

year_levels.description: Keyed by year level string (e.g. '7', '6', '5'). Add year levels progressively as they are curated.

standards.description: List of ACARA content descriptors for this year level.

y_goal.description: Interpreted conceptual endpoint — framed as 'Students...' Derived from the ACARA descriptor and elaborations. This is the Y-goal for prior knowledge lookup purposes.

progression_threads.description: Conceptual progression trees from Foundation to Year 10, organised by science strand. Foundation standards are roots; each node lists its children representing the next conceptual step.

_notes.usage: Referenced by the app for prior knowledge context in lesson prompts and assessment prompts. Not referenced by individual standard unit files — lookup goes directly to this map.
_notes.extension: Add year levels progressively working backwards from Y7. Full unit files (with nodes, width menus, success criteria) are separate — this map only needs descriptor + Y-goal.
_notes.naming: File should always be named science_y_goals_map.json and live in data/

children.description: Standards that build directly on this one.
